expectations.evidence: Uses CSS custom properties: var(--color-primary), var(--color-profit), var(--color-loss), var(--color-text-muted), var(--color-primary-dim), var(--color-danger-dim)
Container uses backdrop-blur-[14px] backdrop-saturate-120 bg-[rgba(24,24,27,0.55)] with shadow
font-mono on all cells, headers, labels. 13px data, 10px headers
border-white/[0.05] container, border-white/[0.04] rows, border-white/[0.06] header
// Recent Trades header with green // prefix, 10px uppercase tracking-[0.15em]
tabular-nums on all price and PnL cells
Animated ping ring for open positions, static dot for closed, LED glow indicator
skeleton-shimmer animation with gradient, 5 rows with proper styling
